title: Karjat Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Karjat, with a Z-Score of +3.97. The city's score is 10.0/10, indicating a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Karjat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 53%, and the wind speed is 7.2 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, which is typical for this type of event.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
